'''âw-h-l''' ('''kawahal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quip|quip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quip|quip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawahal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahal|thiwahal]] || [[word:jiwahal|jiwahal]] || [[word:shiwahal|shiwahal]] || [[word:kiwahal|kiwahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwahal|thuthuwahal]] || [[word:jujuwahal|jujuwahal]] || [[word:shushuwahal|shushuwahal]] || [[word:kukuwahal|kukuwahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwahal|thuwahal]] || [[word:juwahal|juwahal]] || [[word:shuwahal|shuwahal]] || [[word:kuwahal|kuwahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwahal|thuwahal]] || [[word:juwahal|juwahal]] || [[word:shuwahal|shuwahal]] || [[word:kuwahal|kuwahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewahal|thewahal]] || [[word:jewahal|jewahal]] || [[word:shewahal|shewahal]] || [[word:kewahal|kewahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowahal|thothowahal]] || [[word:jojowahal|jojowahal]] || [[word:shoshowahal|shoshowahal]] || [[word:kokowahal|kokowahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowahal|thowahal]] || [[word:jowahal|jowahal]] || [[word:showahal|showahal]] || [[word:kowahal|kowahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowahal|thowahal]] || [[word:jowahal|jowahal]] || [[word:showahal|showahal]] || [[word:kowahal|kowahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwahal|thĂŠwahal]] || [[word:jĂŠwahal|jĂŠwahal]] || [[word:shĂŠwahal|shĂŠwahal]] || [[word:kĂŠwahal|kĂŠwahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawahal|thathawahal]] || [[word:jajawahal|jajawahal]] || [[word:shashawahal|shashawahal]] || [[word:kakawahal|kakawahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawahal|thawahal]] || [[word:jawahal|jawahal]] || [[word:shawahal|shawahal]] || [[word:kawahal|kawahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawahal|thawahal]] || [[word:jawahal|jawahal]] || [[word:shawahal|shawahal]] || [[word:kawahal|kawahal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawahal|shawahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawahal|goshawahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawahal|gokishawahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawahalnĂŒ|shawahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawahalnknĂŒ|goshawahalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahalnĂŒ|gokishawahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawahalshĂ«|shawahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawahalnkshĂ«|goshawahalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawahalshĂ«|gokishawahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahalro|shawahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahalnkro|goshawahalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahalro|gokishawahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahalmu|shawahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahalnkmu|goshawahalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahalmu|gokishawahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawahalsher|shawahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawahalnksher|goshawahalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawahalsher|gokishawahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawahalng|shawahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawahalnkng|goshawahalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawahalng|gokishawahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawahalya|shawahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawahalnkya|goshawahalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawahalya|gokishawahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawahalyam|shawahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawahalnkyam|goshawahalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawahalyam|gokishawahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahalnĂŒshĂ«|shawahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawahalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahalnĂŒro|shawahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahalnknĂŒro|goshawahalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahalnĂŒro|gokishawahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahalnĂŒmu|shawahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahalnknĂŒmu|goshawahalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahalnĂŒmu|gokishawahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahalshĂ«nĂŒ|shawahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahalshĂ«ro|shawahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahalnkshĂ«ro|goshawahalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahalshĂ«ro|gokishawahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahalshĂ«mu|shawahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahalnkshĂ«mu|goshawahalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahalshĂ«mu|gokishawahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahalronĂŒ|shawahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahalnkronĂŒ|goshawahalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahalronĂŒ|gokishawahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahalroshĂ«|shawahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahalnkroshĂ«|goshawahalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahalroshĂ«|gokishawahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahalromu|shawahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahalnkromu|goshawahalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahalromu|gokishawahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahalmunĂŒ|shawahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahalnkmunĂŒ|goshawahalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahalmunĂŒ|gokishawahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahalmushĂ«|shawahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahalnkmushĂ«|goshawahalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahalmushĂ«|gokishawahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahalmuro|shawahalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahalnkmuro|goshawahalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahalmuro|gokishawahalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
